evals.prompt: Build the full editorial calendar for the AI tools & automation niche channel for next week.
evals.expected_output: Produce a table-format calendar with specific topics (not generic), all relevant platforms, content repurposing shown, and measurable CTAs for every entry.
expectations: The response produces a table with Day/Platform/Format/Topic/CTA columns
The response includes YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, X/Twitter, and LinkedIn
The response shows Monday YouTube content repurposed into Wednesday/Thursday Shorts
The response gives specific topic titles with numbers or details, not generic placeholders
The response includes a measurable CTA for every entry

evals.prompt: We just published a 12-minute YouTube video: 'Top 10 AI Tools That Replace Your Entire Marketing Team'. What do we create from it?
evals.expected_output: Apply the full repurposing matrix: 3 YouTube Shorts, 3 TikToks, 3 Instagram Reels, 1 LinkedIn article, 1 SEO blog post, 5 Twitter quote cards, 1 Beehiiv email segment — 14+ pieces total.
expectations: The response lists exactly 3 YouTube Shorts with specific timestamps or moments
The response includes 3 TikToks, 3 Instagram Reels, 1 LinkedIn article, and 5 Twitter/X quote cards
The response mentions 1 SEO blog post targeting a specific keyword
The response includes 1 email newsletter segment for Beehiiv
The total derivative pieces add up to 14 or more

evals.prompt: What content should @CitadelAI post on LinkedIn this month to generate inbound SMB leads?
evals.expected_output: Apply B2B content pillars with specific numbers (318 calls, 127 appointments), rotate story/expertise/opinion/data post types, and include LinkedIn-native rules.
expectations: The response uses specific @CitadelAI proof numbers (318 calls, 127 appointments, or $2K/month saved)
The response rotates all 4 post types: story, expertise, opinion, data
The response prohibits external links in post body (LinkedIn-native rule)
The response specifies responding to all comments within the first 60 minutes
